title: GSTR-1 Filing
description: Monthly return for outward supplies. File details of all sales invoices for the previous month.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 50/day (CGST + SGST) up to Rs. 10,000. Interest: 18% p.a. on tax liability.

title: GSTR-3B Filing
description: Monthly summary return with self-assessed tax payment. Reconcile with GSTR-1 and pay net GST liability.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 50/day up to Rs. 10,000. Interest: 18% p.a. on outstanding tax.

title: TDS Payment (Challan 281)
description: Deposit TDS deducted during the previous month to the government. File Challan 281 through NSDL/bank.
penalty: Interest: 1.5% per month from date of deduction. Penalty under Section 234E for late filing.

title: PF/ECR Filing & Payment
description: File Electronic Challan cum Return (ECR) for Provident Fund contributions and make payment on EPFO portal.
penalty: Damages: 5% to 25% of arrears. Interest: 12% p.a. Prosecution for willful default.

title: ESI Contribution Payment
description: Pay ESI contributions for employees earning up to Rs. 21,000/month. File through ESIC portal.
penalty: Interest: 12% p.a. Damages up to 25% of contribution. Criminal prosecution possible.

title: TDS Quarterly Return (Form 26Q/24Q)
description: File quarterly TDS return for non-salary (26Q) and salary (24Q) deductions. Generate Form 16/16A for employees/vendors.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day under Section 234E. Maximum: Amount of TDS. Penalty under Section 271H: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000.

title: GSTR-9 Annual Return
description: Annual return consolidating all monthly/quarterly returns. Reconcile with books of accounts.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day (CGST + SGST) up to 0.5% of turnover in the State/UT.

title: ROC Annual Return (AOC-4/MGT-7)
description: File financial statements (AOC-4) and annual return (MGT-7) with Registrar of Companies within 30/60 days of AGM.
penalty: Additional fee: Rs. 100/day. Maximum: 12x normal fee. Director disqualification risk for persistent default.

title: Annual General Meeting (AGM)
description: Hold AGM within 6 months from close of financial year. Approve accounts, declare dividends, appoint auditors.
penalty: Fine on company: Rs. 1 lakh extending to Rs. 5 lakhs. Fine on officers: Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 1 lakh.

title: Board Meeting (Quarterly)
description: Hold minimum 4 board meetings per year with gap not exceeding 120 days between meetings.
penalty: Fine: Rs. 25,000 on company. Rs. 5,000 on directors. Continuous default: Rs. 1,000/day.

title: Advance Tax - Q1 (15%)
description: Pay 15% of estimated annual tax liability as first installment of advance tax.
penalty: Interest under Section 234B & 234C at 1% per month for default/deferment.

title: Advance Tax - Q2 (45%)
description: Pay cumulative 45% of estimated annual tax liability (including Q1 payment).
penalty: Interest under Section 234B & 234C at 1% per month.

title: Advance Tax - Q3 (75%)
description: Pay cumulative 75% of estimated annual tax liability.
penalty: Interest under Section 234B & 234C at 1% per month.

title: Advance Tax - Q4 (100%)
description: Pay remaining advance tax to reach 100% of estimated annual liability before March 15.
penalty: Interest under Section 234B & 234C at 1% per month.

title: Income Tax Return - Company
description: File annual income tax return for companies (ITR-6) with audit report if applicable.
penalty: Late fee under Section 234F: Rs. 5,000 (income > Rs. 5 lakhs) or Rs. 1,000. Interest under 234A: 1% per month.

title: Director KYC (DIR-3 KYC)
description: Annual KYC update for all directors holding DIN. Verify mobile, email, and personal details.
penalty: DIN deactivation. Restoration fee: Rs. 5,000.

title: MSME-1 Half-Yearly Return
description: Report outstanding dues to MSME suppliers exceeding 45 days. File twice yearly (April & October).
penalty: Fine: Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 3 lakhs on company. Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 1 lakh on officers.

title: Professional Tax Return
description: File monthly/quarterly professional tax return as per state rules. Deduct from employee salaries and remit.
penalty: Penalty and interest as per respective state Professional Tax Acts. Varies by state.

title: DPT-3 (Deposits Return)
description: Annual return of deposits or transactions not considered as deposits. File by June 30 every year.
penalty: Fine: Up to Rs. 1 crore on company. Rs. 25 lakhs to Rs. 2 crores on officers.
law_reference: Companies Act 2013, Rule 16 of Companies (Acceptance of Deposits) Rules

title: LLP Form 11 (Annual Return)
description: File annual return for LLP within 60 days from end of financial year. Includes partner details and changes.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 100/day. Additional penalty up to Rs. 5 lakhs.

title: LLP Form 8 (Statement of Accounts)
description: File Statement of Account and Solvency within 30 days from 6 months of financial year end.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 100/day. Fine up to Rs. 5 lakhs on LLP and Rs. 1 lakh on designated partners.

title: GSTR-9C (GST Audit)
description: GST Audit/Reconciliation Statement for turnover exceeding Rs. 5 crores. Self-certified reconciliation.
penalty: Same as GSTR-9. Late fee: Rs. 200/day up to 0.5% of turnover.

title: TDS Return Q1 (April-June)
description: File quarterly TDS return for Q1 (April-June). Due by July 31.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day. Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000.

title: TDS Return Q2 (July-Sept)
description: File quarterly TDS return for Q2 (July-September). Due by October 31.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day. Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000.

title: TDS Return Q3 (Oct-Dec)
description: File quarterly TDS return for Q3 (October-December). Due by January 31.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day. Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000.

title: TDS Return Q4 (Jan-March)
description: File quarterly TDS return for Q4 (January-March). Due by May 31.
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day. Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000.
